case.title: ODOM v. NEW YORK LIFE INS CO

opinion.h4: ODOM v. NEW YORK LIFE INS CO, (1938)
opinion.h2: Sherman E. ODOM and Bertha O. Stephens, petitioners, v. NEW YORK LIFE INSURANCE COMPANY. No. 894.
Supreme Court of the United States
opinion.p: Mr. John R. L. Smith, of Macon, Ga., for petitioners.
Petition for writ of certiorari to the United States Circuit Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit denied.
